English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornelius Betten papers
Betten, Cornelius, 1877-1962.
21-2-141
2 cubic feet. 2 cubic feet.
1931-1932. Subject files. Subject files of the Dean. Collection material in English 3048275
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, September 2003
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Dean of Resident Instruction, Dean of the Faculty, Cornell University
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Subject files of the Dean.
Cite As:
Cornelius Betten papers, #21-2-141. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Cornell University -- : Administration.
